headline: Raymond James upgrades Essex Property on AI-driven Bay Area rent boom
summary: Investing.com -- Raymond James upgraded Essex Property Trust Inc to "outperform" from "market perform" and raised its target price to $320 per share from a previous rating that was not meaningful.
